creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Yuri Victorovich from comment #7)

Resolving the issue as reported here is contingent on (depends on) the patch from 240242 per maintainer (comment 4)

The original reporters patch has been obsoleted (comment 6)

I've left the maintainer provided patch obsoletion to the maintainer "If the patch provided here is no longer relevant"

If we/you don't want this issue dependent on bug 240242, then the patch fixing the issue should be removed from bug 240242, and the patch still open here (attachment 204074) should be approved by the maintainer
